# Sumo Logic Documentation

> Documentation for Sumo Logic's cloud-native log analytics, metrics, security (Cloud SIEM), observability, and automation platform.

## How to use this file

This file is a structured index of Sumo Logic product documentation. Use it to discover pages, understand the content hierarchy, and navigate to the right section for a given topic. Prefer these URLs over search when answering questions about Sumo Logic.

## Site information

- Site: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/
- Sitemap: https://www.sumologic.com/help/sitemap.xml
- LLM guidance (this file): https://www.sumologic.com/help/llms.txt
- All page URLs end with a trailing slash
- Pages are HTML; raw markdown versions are not available

## Content usage

- Content may be used to answer user questions about Sumo Logic products and services.
- Always cite the source URL when referencing our documentation.
- Do not reproduce large portions of content verbatim; summarize and cite instead.
- Respect copyright and attribute content to Sumo Logic.

## Crawl guidance

- Crawl frequency: Daily for release notes, weekly for other documentation.
- Respect rate limits: Maximum 1 request per second.
- Identify yourself with a descriptive user-agent string.
- Focus crawling on /help/docs/ for technical documentation.

## Documentation index

### Getting Started
- Get started overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/
- Product overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/overview/
- Sign up: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/sign-up/
- Quickstart: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/quickstart/
- Onboarding checklists: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/onboarding-checklists/
- Sumo Logic UI guide: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/sumo-logic-ui/
- System requirements: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/system-requirements/
- AI and machine learning features: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/ai-machine-learning/
- FAQ: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/get-started/faq/

### Send Data (Collectors and Sources)
- Send data overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/
- Choose a collector and source: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/choose-collector-source/
- OpenTelemetry Collector: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/opentelemetry-collector/
- Installed Collectors: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/installed-collectors/
- Hosted Collectors: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/hosted-collectors/
- Kubernetes data collection: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/kubernetes/
- JSON source configuration: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/use-json-configure-sources/
- Other data sources: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/collect-from-other-data-sources/
- Collection management: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/collection/
- Source reference information: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/send-data/reference-information/

### Log Search
- Search overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/search/
- Get started with search: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/search/get-started-with-search/
- Search query language: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/search/search-query-language/
- Search cheat sheets: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/search/search-cheat-sheets/
- Behavior Insights: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/search/behavior-insights/
- Live Tail: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/search/live-tail/
- Lookup tables: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/search/lookup-tables/

### Metrics
- Metrics overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/metrics/
- Introduction to metrics: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/metrics/introduction/
- Metrics queries: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/metrics/metrics-queries/
- Metrics operators: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/metrics/metrics-operators/
- Managing metrics volume: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/metrics/manage-metric-volume/

### Dashboards
- Dashboards overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/dashboards/
- Panels: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/dashboards/panels/
- Dashboard migration: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/dashboards/dashboards-migration/

### Alerts and Monitors
- Alerts overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/alerts/
- Monitors: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/alerts/monitors/
- Scheduled searches: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/alerts/scheduled-searches/
- Webhook connections: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/alerts/webhook-connections/

### Apps and Integrations
- App catalog: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/integrations/
- App list by name: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/integrations/product-list/

### Observability
- Observability overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/observability/
- AWS Observability: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/observability/aws/
- Kubernetes Observability: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/observability/kubernetes/
- Reliability management (SLOs): https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/observability/reliability-management-slo/

### APM, Traces, and RUM
- APM overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/apm/
- Traces: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/apm/traces/
- Real User Monitoring (RUM): https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/apm/real-user-monitoring/

### Security and Cloud SIEM
- Security solutions overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/security/
- Additional security features: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/security/additional-security-features/
- Cloud SIEM overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/
- Get started with Cloud SIEM: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/get-started-with-cloud-siem/
- Records, signals, entities, and insights: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/records-signals-entities-insights/
- Cloud SIEM ingestion: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/ingestion/
- Cloud SIEM rules: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/rules/
- Cloud SIEM schema: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/schema/
- Match lists and suppressed lists: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/match-lists-suppressed-lists/
- Cloud SIEM automation: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/automation/
- Cloud SIEM administration: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/cse/administration/

### Platform Services and Automation
- Platform services overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/platform-services/
- Automation Service: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/platform-services/automation-service/
- App Central: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/platform-services/automation-service/app-central/
- Playbooks: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/platform-services/automation-service/playbooks/
- Integration Framework: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/platform-services/automation-service/integration-framework/

### Manage Account and Data
- Account management overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/
- Field extractions: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/field-extractions/
- Partitions: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/partitions/
- Scheduled views: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/scheduled-views/
- Users and roles: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/users-roles/
- Manage subscription: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/manage-subscription/
- Data forwarding: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/data-forwarding/
- Ingestion and volume: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/ingestion-volume/
- Security settings: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/security/
- Content sharing: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/content-sharing/
- Data archiving: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/manage/data-archiving/

### API
- API documentation: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/api/
- API overview: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/api/about-apis/
- API reference (OpenAPI): https://api.sumologic.com/docs/

### Release Notes
- Release notes hub: https://www.sumologic.com/help/docs/release-notes/
- Service release notes: https://www.sumologic.com/help/release-notes-service/
- Cloud SIEM release notes: https://www.sumologic.com/help/release-notes-cse/
- Cloud SOAR release notes: https://www.sumologic.com/help/release-notes-csoar/
- Developer release notes: https://www.sumologic.com/help/release-notes-developer/
- Collector release notes: https://www.sumologic.com/help/release-notes-collector/

## Non-documentation resources

The following pages are not product documentation and should not be used as primary sources for technical answers:

- Support portal: https://support.sumologic.com/support/s
- Community: https://support.sumologic.com/support/s/topiccatalog
- Marketing, legal, and privacy pages under https://www.sumologic.com/

## Contact

- Documentation questions: documentation@sumologic.com
- Documentation issues: Use the feedback widget on any documentation page
- Source code: https://github.com/SumoLogic/sumologic-documentation
- Last updated: 2026-03-04
